name: oh-my-logo
description: CLI that renders giant ASCII-art logos with colorful gradients in the terminal.
_commands_note: build resolves to `tsc --project tsconfig.json`; test uses `vitest run` (non-watch) rather than package.json's watch-mode `vitest`. Pins/build are PROVEN by Chunk 2, not here.

moduleSurface.note: The oracle tests bind to the rebuilt module by RELATIVE path: `../src/*.js` and `../../src/utils/*.js` (compiled-extension imports of TS sources). cli.test.ts additionally runs the CLI via `npx tsx ../src/index.ts`. Chunk 5 must mount the rebuilt artifact's public surface at these exact paths for imports to resolve.

_devDeps_note: Verbatim copy of package.json devDependencies at the pinned SHA. These are the test-runner + build toolchain. Exact resolution is pinned by the repo's package-lock.json (also present at this SHA). The scorer (Chunk 5) installs these to run the oracle; the build needs `typescript`; the test runner needs `vitest` (+ `tsx`, used by cli.test.ts to exec the CLI from source).

oracle.description: The held-out test suite for oh-my-logo @ the pinned SHA. This is ONE inventory that drives BOTH capture-withhold (Chunk 3) AND scorer-run (Chunk 5). Withholding is glob/file-based, never 'strip the test dir'. Globs are confirmed against the actual file layout at the SHA (see harness/load-config.mjs --verify).
oracle._fixtures_snapshots_note: Confirmed empty at this SHA: no fixture files and no `__snapshots__/`/`*.snap` exist; tests are pure (no readFileSync of golden files, no toMatchSnapshot). Conventional vitest snapshot location would be `__tests__/**/__snapshots__/**` — recorded here as absent rather than as a zero-match glob, so verification stays honest.

expected.note: Expanding the oracle globs against a clean checkout @ SHA must yield EXACTLY these files. The green test count is NOT asserted here — Chunk 2's baseline establishes N/N at the pin (don't take a count on faith).
